summary: Iteration 85 - Testing OHADA Journal (Plan OHADA) feature. All 13 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: Admin sees 'Plan OHADA' as 3rd sub-tab in Journal menu. OHADA Journal displays KPIs (Total Débit, Total Crédit, Écritures, Équilibre ✓ OK), preset buttons (Aujourd'hui, Hier, 7 jours, Mois en cours), view switch (Brouillard 5 colonnes, Vue 2 colonnes), filters (Compte, Recherche), export buttons (Excel, PDF), and Soldes par compte section.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All OHADA Journal backend endpoints working correctly:
- Response includes: entries, total_debit, total_credit, balanced, accounts, ohada_plan
- Account filter (account=571) correctly filters entries by debit_num OR credit_num
- Search filter (search=Admin) correctly filters by libelle/author/source (case insensitive)
- Invalid date format returns 400 with proper error message
- Empty date range returns valid empty response with balanced=true
Frontend OHADA Journal features working correctly:
- 3 sub-tabs in Journal menu: 'Journal réel', 'Prévisionnel', 'Plan OHADA' (data-testid: journal-view-ohada)
- KPIs displayed: Total Débit, Total Crédit, Écritures, Équilibre (✓ OK)
- Preset buttons work: Aujourd'hui, Hier, 7 jours, Mois en cours
- View switch works: Brouillard (5 colonnes) and Vue 2 colonnes (Débit | Crédit)
- Filters work: Compte (account number) and Recherche (search text)
- Export buttons present and enabled when entries exist: Excel (CSV), PDF (print)
- Soldes par compte section displays account balances with debit/credit/solde
seed_data_creation: Used existing invoice data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 85 confirmed OHADA Journal (Plan OHADA) feature is fully functional. Key behaviors tested: (1) GET /api/journal/ohada returns balanced journal entries with OHADA account mapping, (2) Account filter restricts entries to specific account number, (3) Search filter searches in libelle/author/source, (4) Invalid date returns 400, (5) Frontend displays 3 sub-tabs in Journal menu, (6) KPIs show totals and balance status, (7) Preset buttons change date range, (8) View switch toggles between brouillard table and 2-column view, (9) Export buttons (Excel/PDF) are enabled when entries exist. Minor cosmetic issue: React hydration warning about span/tr nesting in table - doesn't affect functionality.
features_tested: Response structure validation (entries, total_debit, total_credit, balanced, accounts, ohada_plan)
Frontend: Admin login and navigation to Journal > Plan OHADA
Frontend: OHADA Journal component visible (data-testid: ohada-journal)
Frontend: KPIs displayed (Total Débit, Total Crédit, Écritures, Équilibre)
Frontend: Preset buttons (Aujourd'hui, Hier, 7 jours, Mois en cours)
